struct ServiceConfig {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
    credentials: Option<Credentials>,
}

struct Credentials {
    api_key: String,
    database_password: String,
    secret_token: String,
}

impl ServiceConfig {
    fn new(host: String, port: u16) -> Self {
        Self {
            host,
            port,
            credentials: None,
        }
    }

    fn with_credentials(self, creds: Credentials) -> Self {
        Self {
            credentials: Some(creds),
            ..self
        }
    }
}
